prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DAMVQS-6PC-SML-BLCK Product Type: CARGO_STRAP Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: D-Ring Velcrdo Adjustable Tie Down Straps 6 Pack Description: The 6pc Reusable Tie Down Strap Set is the ideal companion for electrical wires, cables, ropes, hoses and just about anything you can wrap these guys around. The hook and loop closure makes for a strong and sturdy hold, great for a wide variety of uses.

They feature an adjustable hook and loop backing making the usable length 9-1/2" to 16". Search Terms: arts crafts sewing fabric adhesive straps tie down d ring velcro Features: - Adjustable Length: 9-1/2" to 16" - D-Ring Loop - Multi-Purpose Use - Length: 16" | Width: 1" - Color: Black === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6-Pack Black D-Ring Velcro Tie Down Straps

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 6-Pk Black D-Ring Adjustable Tie Down Straps

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable 95 To 16 Inches, Hook And Loop Closure, Multi-Purpose, Reusable, Secure Hold

openai.title_differentiation: Set Of 6, Adjustable 9-12" To 16", D-Ring Loop, Hook And Loop Closure, Reusable, Multi-Purpose Organizer
